# Sick Day (Stratechery Update 9-26-2023)

**Source**: inputs/saved_emails/Sick Day (Stratechery Update 9-26-2023)_Tue,_26_Sep_2023_11-09-05_+0000_18ad12dc2462c355.eml
**Type**: email
**Created**: 2025-08-27T03:02:27.148752

---

Hi folks, I have been under the weather for a few days, and I think it is best for me to take a sick day today; I do plan on two more pieces this week, including on Thursday. I did record an episode of Sharp Tech, which will come out in a few hours. Other than that, see you tomorrow.

Hi folks,

I have been under the weather for a few days, and I think it is best for me to take a sick day today; I do plan on two more pieces this week, including on Thursday.

I did record an episode of Sharp Tech, which will come out in a few hours. Other than that, see you tomorrow.

Ben
